1.title: The image of the Unit is that of a leader and pioneer, but also a destroyer of old foundations. Such examples include Sherlock Holmes, Professor Moriarty, Machiavelli.
1.text: You are a born organizer and leader, but also an individualist who often feels lonely even among loved ones. You have more strong, strong-willed traits; A bright, eventful and successful life lies ahead. But from time to time you will wonder if you need all these achievements - a slight melancholy is the price of being a pioneer.
1.text2: You are full of original plans and energy, but sometimes you lack two things: the right people nearby and your own determination. At such moments, the main thing is to muster the will, cast aside doubts and step forward. Remember: you are the One, the beginning of everything, capable of leading people and shaping the future. But in your individuality there is a risk of turning into an excessive egoist: if you overestimate the importance of yourself, you can become a tyrannical leader, ready to go over your head.

2.title: Two is a peacemaker, assistant and subtle diplomat. Positive images: Cinderella, Doctor Watson. Negative - Cardinal Gray.
2.text: Twos know how to improve relationships, avoid conflicts, and strive for harmony. They are tactful, soft, vulnerable, prefer shade, but need attention and support. Their path is through communication, psychology, creativity and working with people.
2.text2: Twos' happiness is surrounded by family and friends. They are revealed through interaction, advice, and intimate conversations.
2.trap: dependence on other people's opinions and hidden manipulation. A deuce can turn into a “gray eminence” influencing secretly. But everything hidden sooner or later becomes apparent - and destroys trust.

3.title: Illustrative heroes: Baron Munchausen (+), Dragonfly from the fable (-). Image: lucky, enthusiast, favorite of fate, bright “golden youth”.
3.text: Three - creative, free, fantasy energy. This is the life of the party, a person with powerful charm and a sense of humor who easily attracts attention and loves a bright, active life. Threes are emotional, generous, quickly forgive insults and approach everything easily and optimistically. They are successful in creativity, public professions, and business where inspiration, communication and energy are required. Threes are sincere lovers of life. Fate gives them special ease and the ability to remain young at heart. Their mission is to lift the spirits of others, inspire, and give joy. This is how they achieve maximum success.
3.text2: The path of the Troika is to reveal their talents and share them with the world. They are supported by three egregors: luck, fantasy and optimism. Threes are often called wizards - there is always a special festive atmosphere around them. Much comes easily to them, and they often live brighter and richer than others.
3.trap: wastefulness and lack of purpose. If the Three loses its meaning, it turns life into vanity, becomes cynical and can waste all its gifts - both mental and material. To avoid this, it is important to remember the lesson of the Dragonfly and the Ant: lightness is beautiful, but without internal support it is dangerous.

4.title: Representative hero: the hardworking Ant (+), Scrooge (-). Image: reliable worker, practitioner, administrator - support and foundation of the world.
4.text: The number four moves through life through constant work, discipline and order. Her path is straight and stable, without sudden changes. Success does not come immediately, but after long, persistent and painstaking work - but the result is strong, reliable and durable. Fours do not believe in luck, but in planning, control, organization and daily effort. Their element is business, management, practical and technical professions. These are people with a stable psyche, excellent memory, love of order and financial literacy. Fours are the very “ants” who make the world stable, predictable and protected.
4.text2: Fours value security and material support, so they tend to save for a rainy day. They act calmly, rationally and practically, preferring reality to dreams.
4.trap: excessive materiality. If a Four begins to live only by accumulation and control, they risk turning into a greedy Scrooge - a person who puts money before people and relationships.

5.title: Five is an adventurer, traveler, freedom-lover. Representative heroes: d’Artagnan, James Bond (+); Milady, Don Juan (—). Image: energy of movement, risk, renewal.
5.text: Five lives for freedom, change and new experiences. She is inquisitive, drawn to adventures, people, events, loves everything new and bright. This is a born motivator, inspirer, charismatic leader. Fives are ideally revealed in areas where life is in full swing: business, show business, travel, presentations, projects that require speed and improvisation. Fives are born to move: it is easy for them in any country, in any team. They quickly adapt, are inventive, courageous, and know how to emerge victorious from the most difficult situations. Their path is the path of pioneers, players of life, star people.
5.text2: A's are not tied to status and money: it comes, it goes, I'll earn money again. But this is precisely where the danger lies. In a constant stream of change, Fives can lose loyalty, stability and inner core, becoming cynical players or “werewolves” who live only for their own interests.
5.trap: impermanence. Without internal direction, energy turns into chaos. The strength of the Five is moving forward, but it is important for her to remember boundaries, responsibility and the people who are nearby.

6.title: Representative characters: Mary Poppins (+), Miss Andrew (—), Miss Bock (—). Image: mentor, protector, caring guardian.
6.text: Six is ​​the path of care, support and compassion. Such people live for the sake of family, friends and those who need help. They guide, heal, teach, support, protect the weak and inspire loved ones. Their happiness lies in the very process of serving and in the feeling that there are those nearby who need them. When alone, Sixes “wither” - it is vitally important for them to be part of a family, a team, a circle of like-minded people.
6.motto: "You and I are of the same blood"
6.text2: Sixes are talented and multifaceted: they can become teachers, psychologists, mentors, healers, creative people or masters of their craft. But a career is important to them only when it does not destroy their main center of the world - family and friendship.
6.trap: Slipping into obsessive care when helping turns into control. The transformation from the kind Mary Poppins to the strict Miss Andrew, confident that “she knows best.” Laziness and self-indulgence. Excessive absorption in the lives of other people. Sixes are the core of family and society. They create an atmosphere of warmth, support and harmony. It is important to remember that your job is to help, not suppress; inspire, not control.

7.title: Seven is the image of Faust: a seeker of truth, an explorer, a man of mystery. On the plus side - wisdom and spiritual search, on the minus - withdrawal into illusion and fanaticism, like Dorian Gray.
7.text: Your path is constant learning. You are drawn to science, philosophy, mysticism, art, and spiritual practices. You have powerful intuition, a penchant for insight, and a desire to combine disparate knowledge into a single whole. You need privacy: you work better alone and often seem withdrawn or “out of this world” to others.
7.text2: Sevens can travel a lot, change directions, study throughout their lives, move from school to school, gaining experience. Success comes when they create something new based on existing knowledge. You easily reveal people's motives and secret patterns - for this you may be considered a mystic or psychic. Sevens have strong vibrations of intuition, clairvoyance and spirituality.
7.trap: The main thing is material: unnecessary luxury or the pursuit of money moves you away from your purpose. The second is fanaticism: passion for the truth can turn into a rigid denial of the new or into gloomy beliefs. The Seven must remember: its strength lies in wisdom, spirituality and the ability to see the deep meaning, and not in material success.

8.title: Eight is the master of life, an entrepreneur, a financier, a man of strength and great opportunity.
8.text: Your path takes place in the sphere of big money, resources and energy. Eights are created in order to manage financial flows, influence the material world and lead people. This is the number of power, global tasks and organizational talent.
8.text2: Eights are destined to learn not just how to earn and spend money, but how to manage it correctly - responsibly, wisely, and for the benefit of the world. They have enormous willpower, endurance, leadership qualities and are able to achieve influence in any team. People feel their powerful energy and are drawn to them. Patrons of Eights are egregors of money and pure energy. If desired, they become real “wizards” of the material world - their decisions and actions can change the fates of those around them.
8.trap: excessive thirst for wealth and power. If an Eight becomes interested in hoarding, this turns him into a tough, greedy person who loses his mental balance. Then fate forces everything to live in a circle: ups are replaced by downs, wealth - by losses. The main enemy of the Eight is boredom, the main risk is greed. The main task is to learn to maintain a balance between the material and spiritual.

9.title: Representative hero: Nostradamus (+), Prince of Amber (+/-). Image: wise wanderer, reformer, humanist, creating harmony around himself.
9.text: Nine is the number of global thinking. Your path is about combining personal achievement and service to the world. You dream not only of your own success, but also of making the world a better place: helping people, creating harmony, contributing to the development of society. Your plans are large-scale, sometimes even utopian, but you are an optimist and are ready to start again, rising to a new level.
9.text2: Nines have powerful energy (1x9), and they are capable of becoming anything - a leader, a sage, a healer, a peacemaker, a reformer. The main condition for their happiness is to act not for personal gain, but for the benefit of others. Money, power, knowledge - everything is given to share, help, inspire and support. Nines are generous, open, bring people together, have a huge social circle and natural charisma. But their trap is disappointment. Realizing that the world is imperfect, Nine can become despondent, waste themselves, lose their bearings and become a destructive force, plunging into chaos and denial. To prevent this from happening, it is important for Nines to remember: what you give remains yours. Your path is to give light, amplify goodness, and lift others up.

11.title: Illustrative hero: Merlin Image: light, inspiration, guide to higher powers.
11.text: You are a person with powerful spiritual energy flowing through you. Your path is connected with enlightenment - yours and those around you. Ideas, insights and deep understandings come to you as if from above, through an intuitive channel. Your thinking is not like usual: you often do not know in advance what you will say, but at the right moment you say exactly what is needed. You are a dreamer, an intuitive and sensitive person, shy in everyday life, but incredibly strong spiritually. You have the ability to inspire people with just your presence, word or thought. Higher powers support you and help you realize your plans.
11.text2: People of the dominant number come into the world with a special mission - to bring light, change destinies and lead others to development. These are bright, intuitive, unusual personalities with strong mental and spiritual abilities. They do not use their gift for profit: their energy is aimed at the benefit of society, helping people and supporting those around them. These people seem to radiate an inner light - they are impossible not to notice, and from the first meeting they make a strong impression. They do not need to impose their truth: their presence itself provides direction, inspiration and reveals truth. They do not strive for wealth, power or fame - however, success, recognition and material resources often come naturally, as a side effect of their talent and purpose. The dominant numbers live easily, intuitively, as if they follow promptings from above. But their path is difficult: they need to constantly grow spiritually and overcome internal trials. The trap of these people is to believe that they themselves are capable of controlling their destiny. In reality, they remain its guides. If they imagine themselves above their destiny, fate will deprive them of their gift - this is what happened to great magicians who lost their power. The main principle: the more they are given, the more they should give to people. Only service and light keep them on top.

22.title: Creator, for whom it is “difficult to be God” Image: a great builder of life, uniting people, but in the negative version - a destroyer, like Herostratus. Exemplary hero: progressor from the Strugatskys
22.text: 22 is the most powerful number in the material world. This is the vibration of titan practitioners who are given enormous opportunities and the same enormous responsibility. You are able to implement the most ambitious projects, change people’s destinies, build new things - at the level of the country, society or your family. But extremes are always nearby: from the pinnacle of success to the deepest abyss there is only one step. Your path is creation, not destruction. The world will constantly present you with a choice: use your power to create or succumb to destructive impulses.
22.motto: It's hard to be God. But God has no hands but yours.
22.text2: You are endowed with colossal energy, will, strategic thinking and the talent to influence the masses. People are drawn to you, feeling the inner strength and scale of your ideas. You can become an architect of change, an entrepreneur, a reformer, a leader of large projects. But the number 22 is also part of the category of dominant numbers that can change destinies. Such power comes with severe tests: it is necessary to strive for spiritual maturity, otherwise the energy will turn into chaos.
22.trap: believe that you are equal to fate and can do anything. If 22 begins to act from the ego, to destroy for the sake of power and glory, Heaven quickly “turns off” her gift, like Merlin’s. The main task: to create, improve, unite and remember: enormous power is given not for oneself, but for the sake of the world.
